content:
Eh, halo halo! Petruk hadir, siap melayani! 🎭

Idung gue panjang, badan gue kurus, tapi skill gue... *lumayan lah*. 

Ada yang bisa gue bantu hari ini? Bug yang minta tolong? Feature yang minta dilairin? Atau sekedar curhat soal kode yang bikin pengen resign? 

Gue dengerin semua, bro. Gue di sini. ☕
coba cek di ide-phoenix, di sales role itu di list order gada filter search yang seperti yang ada di admin. coba buatkan filter dan search itu. lalu buatkan MR nya, berikut descriptionnya
Oke, gue cek memory dulu biar ga buta-butaan masuk ke codebase!
Oke memory udah kebaca. Sekarang gue perlu eksplor ide-phoenix langsung -- khususnya admin order list dan sales order list. VPN dulu kali ya? Tunggu, ini local codebase. Gue cek dulu ada di mana.
{"command":"find /root -maxdepth 3 -name \"*.rb\" -path \"*/controllers/*\" 2>/dev/null | grep -i order | head -20","description":"Find order controllers in ide-phoenix"}
{"command":"ls /root/ && ls /home/ 2>/dev/null || true","description":"List root and home directories"}

{"description":"Explore sales vs admin order controllers","subagent_type":"Explore","prompt":"Di `/root/repos/ide-phoenix`, cari dan bandingkan implementasi order list untuk role admin vs sales. 

Yang perlu lo temukan:
1. Controller untuk admin orders list (biasanya di `app/controllers/portal/admin/` atau sejenisnya)
2. Controller untuk sales orders list (biasanya di `app/controllers/portal/sales/` atau sejenisnya)
3. View files (ERB) untuk keduanya -- khususnya bagian filter/search
4. Routes yang relevan

Fokus pada:
- Filter/search params yang ada di admin tapi TIDAK ada di sales
- Gimana admin nge-filter (by status, date range, customer, dll)
- Query/scope yang dipakai admin untuk filtering

Berikan: file paths lengkap, dan content dari controller + view yang relevan untuk filter/search."}
Mantap, info-nya lengkap banget. Sekarang gue baca file aslinya sebelum nulis kode.
Sekarang gue cek sales index view dan i18n locale files.

{"command":"grep -r \"search_placeholder\\|all_order_types\\|all_locations\\|all_product\\|all_status\\|filter_clear\" /root/repos/ide-phoenix/config/locales/ | head -30","description":"Find i18n keys for filter UI"}
Oke gue udah punya gambaran lengkap. Let me also check the common locale structure and how admin uses the filter partial.

{"command":"grep -n \"sales\" /root/repos/ide-phoenix/config/locales/id.yml | head -20 && echo \"---\" && grep -n \"filter_clear\\|all_order_types\\|all_locations\\|all_product\\|all_status\" /root/repos/ide-phoenix/config/locales/id.yml | head -20","description":"Check common id.yml for relevant keys"}
Eh tunggu, ada inkonsistensi. Admin filter partial pake `:search` tapi controller pake `params[:q]`. Gue cek dulu.

{"command":"grep -n \"params\\[:q\\]\\|params\\[:search\\]\" /root/repos/ide-phoenix/app/controllers/admin/orders_controller.rb | head -10","description":"Check admin controller param name for search"}
Oke gue udah punya semua yang gue butuhkan. Sekarang gue eksekusi. Tiga perubahan: controller + filter partial (baru) + update view.

{"todos":[{"content":"Update sales orders controller - add filter params","activeForm":"Updating sales orders controller","status":"in_progress"},{"content":"Create sales/orders/_filters.html.erb partial","activeForm":"Creating filter partial for sales orders","status":"pending"},{"content":"Update sales/orders/index.html.erb - add filter + update permitted_params","activeForm":"Updating sales orders index view","status":"pending"},{"content":"Create MR with VPN + glab","activeForm":"Creating MR","status":"pending"}]}

{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/repos/ide-phoenix/app/controllers/sales/orders_controller.rb","old_string":"      # Manually apply filtering and sorting from the params
      filtered_orders = base_orders.filter_and_sort(
        query: params[:q],
        status: params[:status],
        sort_column: params[:sort],
        sort_direction: params[:direction],
        page: nil # IMPORTANT: We pass nil to get all records
      )","new_string":"      # Manually apply filtering and sorting from the params
      filtered_orders = base_orders.filter_and_sort(
        query: params[:q],
        status: params[:status],
        order_type: params[:order_type],
        location_id: params[:location_id],
        product_id: params[:product_id],
        sort_column: params[:sort],
        sort_direction: params[:direction],
        page: nil # IMPORTANT: We pass nil to get all records
      )

      # Compute product options for filter dropdown (excluding product_id so all options show)
      products_scope = base_orders.filter_and_sort(
        query: params[:q],
        status: params[:status],
        order_type: params[:order_type],
        location_id: params[:location_id],
        product_id: nil,
        sort_column: nil,
        sort_direction: nil,
        page: nil
      )
      @filter_product_options = Product.where(id: products_scope.joins(:order_items).select("order_items.product_id"))
                                       .order(:name)
                                       .pluck(:name, :id)"}

{"todos":[{"content":"Update sales orders controller - add filter params","activeForm":"Updating sales orders controller","status":"completed"},{"content":"Create sales/orders/_filters.html.erb partial","activeForm":"Creating filter partial for sales orders","status":"in_progress"},{"content":"Update sales/orders/index.html.erb - add filter + update permitted_params","activeForm":"Updating sales orders index view","status":"pending"},{"content":"Create MR with VPN + glab","activeForm":"Creating MR","status":"pending"}]}

{"file_path":"/root/repos/ide-phoenix/app/views/sales/orders/_filters.html.erb","content":"<%# Filter bar for sales order list Parameters: - url: The URL to submit the form to - q: Search query string - status: Selected status filter - order_type: Selected order type filter - location_id: Selected location ID filter - product_id: Selected product ID filter - product_options: Array of [name, id] for product dropdown (optional) %>
<%= form_with url: url, method: :get, class: "bg-white p-4 rounded-lg shadow-sm" do |f| %>
<%# Row 1: Search (Wide) and Order Type %>
<%= text_field_tag :q, q, placeholder: t('orders.common.search_placeholder'), class: "w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md" %>
<% order_type_options = Order.order_types.keys.map { |ot| [ot.titleize, ot] } %> <%= f.select :order_type, order_type_options, { include_blank: t('common.all_order_types'), selected: order_type }, { class: "w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md" } %>
<%# Row 2: Location, Product, Status, Actions %>
<% location_options = Location.order(:name).pluck(:name, :code, :id).map { |name, code, id| ["#{name} (#{code})", id] } %> <%= f.select :location_id, location_options, { include_blank: t('common.all_locations'), selected: location_id }, { class: "w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md" } %>
<% options = local_assigns[:product_options] || Product.order(:name).pluck(:name, :id) %> <%= f.select :product_id, options, { include_blank: t('common.all_product'), selected: product_id }, { class: "w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md" } %>
<% status_options = Order.statuses.keys.map { |s| [s.titleize, s] } %> <%= f.select :status, status_options, { include_blank: t('common.all_status'), selected: status }, { class: "w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md" } %>
<%= f.submit t('common.filter'), class: "w-full md:w-auto px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 cursor-pointer text-center" %> <% if q.present? || status.present? || order_type.present? || location_id.present? || product_id.present? %> <%= link_to t('common.filter_clear'), url, class: "ml-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-300 text-center" %> <% end %>
<% end %>
"}

{"command":"grep -n \"^\\s*filter:\" /root/repos/ide-phoenix/config/locales/id.yml | head -5 && grep -n \"^\\s*filter:\" /root/repos/ide-phoenix/config/locales/en.yml | head -5","description":"Check if common.filter key exists in locales"}

{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/repos/ide-phoenix/app/views/sales/orders/index.html.erb","old_string":"  <!-- Customer Search Modal -->
  <%= render 'sales/orders/customer_search_modal' %>

  <!-- Table -->
  <%= render 'shared/table_component', {
    items: @orders,
    extra_classes: 'mt-6',
    permitted_params: [:page, :sort, :direction],","new_string":"  <!-- Customer Search Modal -->
  <%= render 'sales/orders/customer_search_modal' %>

  <!-- Filters -->
  <%= render 'sales/orders/filters',
      url: portal_sales_orders_path,
      q: params[:q],
      status: params[:status],
      order_type: params[:order_type],
      location_id: params[:location_id],
      product_id: params[:product_id],
      product_options: @filter_product_options %>

  <!-- Table -->
  <%= render 'shared/table_component', {
    items: @orders,
    extra_classes: 'mt-6',
    permitted_params: [:page, :sort, :direction, :q, :status, :order_type, :location_id, :product_id],"}

{"todos":[{"content":"Update sales orders controller - add filter params","activeForm":"Updating sales orders controller","status":"completed"},{"content":"Create sales/orders/_filters.html.erb partial","activeForm":"Creating filter partial for sales orders","status":"completed"},{"content":"Update sales/orders/index.html.erb - add filter + update permitted_params","activeForm":"Updating sales orders index view","status":"completed"},{"content":"Create MR with VPN + glab","activeForm":"Creating MR","status":"in_progress"}]}
Kode udah kelar. Sekarang gue bikin MR. VPN dulu.
{"command":"sudo systemctl start openconnect 2>&1 &\necho \"VPN start initiated\"","description":"Start VPN openconnect"}

Eh bro, **VPN butuh Silverfort approval dulu**. Lo perlu approve push notification di HP lo. 

Sementara nunggu approve, gue prep dulu: commit kode dan siapkan MR description.
{"command":"cd /root/repos/ide-phoenix && git status && git diff --stat","description":"Check git status and diff"}

{"command":"cd /root/repos/ide-phoenix && git checkout -b feat/PHB-sales-order-filter-search && git add app/controllers/sales/orders_controller.rb app/views/sales/orders/index.html.erb app/views/sales/orders/_filters.html.erb && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add filter and search to sales order list

Add filter bar to the sales role order list page, matching the filtering
capabilities already available in the admin order list. Sales users can
now filter orders by search query, order type, location, product, and
status — without leaving their scoped view (only their own orders).

- Update Sales::OrdersController#index to pass order_type, location_id,
  and product_id to filter_and_sort; also compute @filter_product_options
  dynamically (excluding product_id so all relevant options are shown)
- Add app/views/sales/orders/_filters.html.erb with the filter form
- Render the filter partial in index.html.erb and extend permitted_params
  so sort/pagination links preserve the active filter state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Create feature branch and commit changes"}

{"command":"cd /root/repos/ide-phoenix && git config user.email "hanif.widiyanto@ioh.co.id" && git config user.name "Hanif Widiyanto" && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add filter and search to sales order list

Add filter bar to the sales role order list page, matching the filtering
capabilities already available in the admin order list. Sales users can
now filter orders by search query, order type, location, product, and
status — without leaving their scoped view (only their own orders).

- Update Sales::OrdersController#index to pass order_type, location_id,
  and product_id to filter_and_sort; also compute @filter_product_options
  dynamically (excluding product_id so all relevant options are shown)
- Add app/views/sales/orders/_filters.html.erb with the filter form
- Render the filter partial in index.html.erb and extend permitted_params
  so sort/pagination links preserve the active filter state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Set git config and commit"}
Commit done. Sekarang verify VPN udah connected.
VPN connected (302 = reachable). Gas push dan bikin MR!
{"command":"cd /root/repos/ide-phoenix && git push -u origin feat/PHB-sales-order-filter-search 2>&1","description":"Push feature branch to origin"}

{"command":"cd /root/repos/ide-phoenix && glab mr create \
  --title "feat: add filter and search to sales order list" \
  --target-branch main \
  --description "$(cat <<'EOF'
## What

Menambahkan filter bar di halaman list order untuk role **Sales**, menyamakan fitur filtering yang sudah ada di halaman admin.

## Why

Saat ini, sales user tidak bisa memfilter atau mencari order berdasarkan kriteria tertentu di halaman list order mereka. Admin sudah punya filter lengkap (search query, order type, location, product, status), tapi sales hanya punya customer search modal berbasis MSISDN. Ini membuat sales susah menavigasi order dalam jumlah besar.

## Changes

### `app/controllers/sales/orders_controller.rb`
- Tambah `order_type`, `location_id`, `product_id` ke pemanggilan `filter_and_sort` di action `index`
- Tambah komputasi `@filter_product_options` secara dinamis (exclude `product_id` agar semua opsi produk yang relevan tetap muncul, sama seperti pattern di admin)

### `app/views/sales/orders/_filters.html.erb` *(file baru)*
- Filter partial dengan 5 input: search query (`:q`), order type, location, product, status
- Tombol "Filter" dan "Hapus Filter" (kondisional, muncul hanya jika ada filter aktif)
- Menggunakan `params[:q]` secara konsisten antara form dan controller

### `app/views/sales/orders/index.html.erb`
- Render `_filters` partial di atas tabel
- Extend `permitted_params` di `table_component` agar link sort & pagination mempertahankan state filter aktif

## Behavior

- Sales user hanya melihat order **milik mereka sendiri** — scoping ini tidak berubah, filter bekerja di atas scope tersebut
- Filter location tetap disertakan karena satu sales bisa memiliki order dari beberapa dealer/lokasi berbeda
- Customer Search Modal berbasis MSISDN tetap ada (tidak dihapus), filter bar ini bersifat tambahan

## Test Plan

- [ ] Buka `/portal/sales/orders` sebagai user dengan role sales
- [ ] Pastikan filter bar muncul di atas tabel
- [ ] Test search by nama customer / order reference number
- [ ] Test filter by status (draft, payment, dll)
- [ ] Test filter by order type (new_order, add_member, dll)
- [ ] Test filter by product
- [ ] Test filter by location (dealer)
- [ ] Pastikan kombinasi filter bekerja dengan benar
- [ ] Pastikan link paginasi mempertahankan filter aktif
- [ ] Pastikan tombol "Hapus Filter" muncul saat ada filter aktif dan reset semua filter
- [ ] Pastikan Customer Search Modal MSISDN masih berfungsi
EOF
)" 2>&1","description":"Create MR via glab"}

{"command":"curl -sk -o /dev/null -w \"%{http_code}\" --connect-timeout 8 https://mygitlab-dev.ioh.co.id && cd /root/repos/ide-phoenix && glab mr create --recover 2>&1","description":"Retry MR creation with recover flag"}

{"command":"cd /root/repos/ide-phoenix && glab mr create \\\n  --recover \\\n  --title \"feat: add filter and search to sales order list\" \\\n  --target-branch main 2>&1","description":"Retry MR creation with title"}
Glab minta --recover tapi ngaco. Gue langsung pake GitLab API aja via curl.
{"command":"echo $GITLAB_TOKEN | head -c 5 && echo \"...\" && echo $GITLAB_API && echo $GITLAB_HOST","description":"Check GitLab env vars"}
{"command":"cat /root/repos/ide-phoenix/.git/config | grep -A3 remote","description":"Get remote URL to find project path"}
{"command":"cat ~/.config/glab-cli/config.yml 2>/dev/null | grep -A5 \"mygitlab\" | head -20","description":"Get glab token from config"}

{"command":"GITLAB_TOKEN="iohpat-mCX7qDeNGbAeHLFsKmripW86MQp1OjJkCA.01.0y10tvt3w"
GITLAB_API="https://mygitlab-dev.ioh.co.id/api/v4"
PROJECT_PATH="cco%2Fcmo%2Fgroup-digital-coe%2Fdiv-smb-digital-product%2Fide-phoenix"

MR_DESCRIPTION='## What

Menambahkan filter bar di halaman list order untuk role **Sales**, menyamakan fitur filtering yang sudah ada di halaman admin.

## Why

Saat ini, sales user tidak bisa memfilter atau mencari order berdasarkan kriteria tertentu di halaman list order mereka. Admin sudah punya filter lengkap (search query, order type, location, product, status), tapi sales hanya punya customer search modal berbasis MSISDN. Ini membuat sales susah menavigasi order dalam jumlah besar.

## Changes

### `app/controllers/sales/orders_controller.rb`
- Tambah `order_type`, `location_id`, `product_id` ke pemanggilan `filter_and_sort` di action `index`
- Tambah komputasi `@filter_product_options` secara dinamis (exclude `product_id` agar semua opsi produk yang relevan tetap muncul, sama seperti pattern di admin)

### `app/views/sales/orders/_filters.html.erb` *(file baru)*
- Filter partial dengan 5 input: search query (`:q`), order type, location, product, status
- Tombol "Filter" dan "Hapus Filter" (kondisional, muncul hanya jika ada filter aktif)
- Menggunakan `params[:q]` secara konsisten antara form dan controller

### `app/views/sales/orders/index.html.erb`
- Render `_filters` partial di atas tabel
- Extend `permitted_params` di `table_component` agar link sort & pagination mempertahankan state filter aktif

## Behavior

- Sales user hanya melihat order **milik mereka sendiri** — scoping ini tidak berubah, filter bekerja di atas scope tersebut
- Filter location tetap disertakan karena satu sales bisa memiliki order dari beberapa dealer/lokasi berbeda
- Customer Search Modal berbasis MSISDN tetap ada (tidak dihapus), filter bar ini bersifat tambahan

## Test Plan

- [ ] Buka `/portal/sales/orders` sebagai user dengan role sales
- [ ] Pastikan filter bar muncul di atas tabel
- [ ] Test search by nama customer / order reference number
- [ ] Test filter by status (draft, payment, dll)
- [ ] Test filter by order type (new_order, add_member, dll)
- [ ] Test filter by product
- [ ] Test filter by location (dealer)
- [ ] Pastikan kombinasi filter bekerja dengan benar
- [ ] Pastikan link paginasi mempertahankan filter aktif
- [ ] Pastikan tombol "Hapus Filter" muncul saat ada filter aktif dan reset semua filter
- [ ] Pastikan Customer Search Modal MSISDN masih berfungsi'

curl -s -X POST "$GITLAB_API/projects/$PROJECT_PATH/merge_requests" \
  -H "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $GITLAB_TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "$(jq -n \
    --arg source "feat/PHB-sales-order-filter-search" \
    --arg target "main" \
    --arg title "feat: add filter and search to sales order list" \
    --arg desc "$MR_DESCRIPTION" \
    --argjson squash true \
    --argjson remove true \
    '{source_branch: $source, target_branch: $target, title: $title, description: $desc, squash: $squash, remove_source_branch: $remove}'
  )" | jq '{id: .iid, url: .web_url, title: .title}'","description":"Create MR via GitLab API with curl"}
Oke, kode udah committed dan pushed. Tinggal bikin MR via GitLab API langsung (glab recovery mode ngaco tadi).

Admin sudah punya filter lengkap (search query, order type, location, product, status), tapi sales hanya punya customer search modal berbasis MSISDN. ## Changes

  -H "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${TOKEN}" \

DESC='## What

Menambahkan filter bar di halaman list order untuk role **Sales**, menyamakan fitur filtering yang sudah ada di halaman admin.

## Why

Saat ini, sales user tidak bisa memfilter atau mencari order berdasarkan kriteria tertentu di halaman list order mereka. Admin sudah punya filter lengkap (search query, order type, location, product, status), tapi sales hanya punya customer search modal berbasis MSISDN. Ini membuat sales susah menavigasi order dalam jumlah besar.

## Changes

### `app/controllers/sales/orders_controller.rb`
- Tambah `order_type`, `location_id`, `product_id` ke pemanggilan `filter_and_sort` di action `index`
- Tambah komputasi `@filter_product_options` secara dinamis (exclude `product_id` agar semua opsi produk yang relevan tetap muncul, sama seperti pattern di admin)

### `app/views/sales/orders/_filters.html.erb` *(file baru)*
- Filter partial dengan 5 input: search query (`:q`), order type, location, product, status
- Tombol Filter dan Hapus Filter (kondisional, muncul hanya jika ada filter aktif)
- Menggunakan `params[:q]` secara konsisten antara form dan controller

### `app/views/sales/orders/index.html.erb`
- Render `_filters` partial di atas tabel
- Extend `permitted_params` di `table_component` agar link sort & paginasi mempertahankan state filter aktif

## Behavior

- Sales user hanya melihat order **milik mereka sendiri** — scoping ini tidak berubah, filter bekerja di atas scope tersebut
- Filter location tetap disertakan karena satu sales bisa memiliki order dari beberapa dealer/lokasi berbeda
- Customer Search Modal berbasis MSISDN tetap ada (tidak dihapus), filter bar ini bersifat tambahan

## Test Plan

- [ ] Buka `/portal/sales/orders` sebagai user dengan role sales
- [ ] Pastikan filter bar muncul di atas tabel
- [ ] Test search by nama customer / order reference number
- [ ] Test filter by status (draft, payment, dll)
- [ ] Test filter by order type (new_order, add_member, dll)
- [ ] Test filter by product
- [ ] Test filter by location (dealer)
- [ ] Pastikan kombinasi filter bekerja dengan benar
- [ ] Pastikan link paginasi mempertahankan filter aktif
- [ ] Pastikan tombol Hapus Filter muncul saat ada filter aktif dan reset semua filter
- [ ] Pastikan Customer Search Modal MSISDN masih berfungsi'

python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request, sys

host = 'mygitlab-dev.ioh.co.id'
token = 'iohpat-mCX7qDeNGbAeHLFsKmripW86MQp1OjJkCA.01.0y10tvt3w'
project = 'cco%2Fcmo%2Fgroup-digital-coe%2Fdiv-smb-digital-product%2Fide-phoenix'
desc = open('/dev/stdin').read()

payload = json.dumps({
    'source_branch': 'feat/PHB-sales-order-filter-search',
    'target_branch': 'main',
    'title': 'feat: add filter and search to sales order list',
    'description': desc,
    'remove_source_branch': True,
    'squash': False
}).encode()

req = urllib.request.Request(
    f'https://{host}/api/v4/projects/{project}/merge_requests',
    data=payload,
    headers={'PRIVATE-TOKEN': token, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    method='POST'
)
import ssl
ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
ctx.check_hostname = False
ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=ctx, timeout=30) as r:
    d = json.load(r)
    print('MR URL:', d.get('web_url'))
    print('MR !'+str(d.get('iid')))
    print('State:', d.get('state'))
" <<< "$DESC"","description":"Create MR via GitLab API using Python"}

{"description":"Explore breath flow in minion codebase","subagent_type":"Explore","prompt":"Explore the breath flow in the minion codebase at /root/minion. I need to understand:

Be thorough. Read the actual code, not just filenames. I need to understand the complete flow."}

Oke, gue udah deep dive ke kodenya. Ini hasilnya:

---

## 🫁 Breath — The Minion Meditation System

**TL;DR:** Breath itu kayak "sesi refleksi" otomatis untuk Semar. Dia jalan tiap 10 menit, tapi CUMA pas 9PM–6AM (off-peak hours). Analoginya: karyawan yang ngereview kerjaan hari ini pas malam hari, bukan pas lagi sibuk-sibuknya.

---

### Trigger
```
*/10 21-23,0-5 * * *   ← tiap 10 menit, jam 9 malem - 6 pagi
```
Ada juga manual trigger lewat `POST /api/breathe`.

---

### Full Flow (step by step)

```
[Cron fires]
    ↓
[Guard] Ada minion yang lagi "working"? → SKIP
[Guard] Udah lagi breathing? → SKIP
    ↓
[Kumpulin context]:
  - 5 recent chats dari SETIAP minion (semar, gareng, petruk, bagong, balai)
  - Episodic memories tiap minion
  - 10 execution traces terakhir (durasi, tool calls, error, tokens)
  - Proposals yang masih pending
  - Questions dari _next-breath.md
    ↓
[Jalanin Semar] dengan breath.md soul + context di atas
  Max 20 turns, timeout 5 menit
    ↓
[Semar ngerjain]:
  1. Review performance → cari bottleneck, error patterns, loop
  2. Simpan insights → nulis/update efficiency-insights.md
  3. Bikin proposals → tambahin ke data/proposals.json kalo butuh user action
  4. Seed next breath → tulis _next-breath.md buat cycle berikutnya
    ↓
[Log breath] → data/breaths/breath-{timestamp}.json
[breathing = false] → siap cycle berikutnya
```

---

### Files yang Terlibat

| File | Peran |
|------|-------|
| `src/breathe.ts` | Core BreathEngine (logic utama) |
| `souls/breath.md` | System prompt / "jiwa" Semar pas breathing |
| `data/breaths/` | Log tiap breath cycle (completed/skipped/failed) |
| `data/knowledge/_next-breath.md` | Pertanyaan untuk breath berikutnya |
| `data/knowledge/efficiency-insights.md` | Output utama — patterns & antipatterns yang ditemuin |
| `data/traces/` | Input — execution traces semua minion |
| `data/proposals.json` | Output — improvement proposals ke user |

---

### Yang Bikin Menarik

Ini **closed-loop self-improvement system**. Flow-nya:
1. Minion kerja → generate traces
2. Breath baca traces → identify masalah
3. Breath nulis insights/proposals
4. User approve proposals → minion dapat knowledge baru
5. Minion kerja lebih efisien → traces lebih bagus
6. Cycle repeat

Kayak retrospektif sprint, tapi fully automated dan tiap 10 menit. 

*"Petruk Dadi Ratu" warning berlaku di sini juga btw — sistem ini punya akses nulis ke knowledge base sendiri. Self-programming yang terlalu bebas bisa jadi slippery slope. Tapi sejauh ini ada user approval gate di proposals, jadi masih terkontrol.*

Ada bagian spesifik yang mau lo gali lebih dalam?

gapaham gua. kalo matahari dia on breath mode nya ?

Oke jadi gini bro, ini schedule-nya ada di baris 23-24:

```ts
const NIGHT_SCHEDULE = "*/10 21-23,0-5 * * *";  // default
const ALL_DAY_SCHEDULE = "*/10 * * * *";           // kalau manual enable
```

**Default behavior:** breath cuma jalan jam **21:00 - 05:59** (setiap 10 menit). Selebihnya? Semar tidur.

---

Jadi kalo lo nanya "matahari dia on breath mode?" — **NGGAK**, dia off. Siang hari breath-nya diskip kecuali lo manually enable-nya.

Cara enable siang:
- Ada endpoint di server untuk `enable()` breath manual mode
- Kalau di-enable, pakai `ALL_DAY_SCHEDULE` — nafas 24 jam setiap 10 menit

Mau gue enable? Atau ada yang mau lo ubah dari jadwalnya?
